lex.bot.grammarslottypesource.CfnAbout: Describes the Amazon S3 bucket name and location for the grammar that is the source of the slot type.

lex.bot.grammarslottypesource.KmsKeyArn.Description: The AWS Key Management Service key required to decrypt the contents of the grammar, if any.

lex.bot.grammarslottypesource.S3BucketNa.Description: The name of the S3 bucket that contains the grammar source.

lex.bot.grammarslottypesource.S3ObjectKe.Description: The path to the grammar in the S3 bucket.
